memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_tensor< TENSORTYPE > internal_tensor, const TTL_tensor< TENSORTYPE > external_tensor, TTL_event *event)
memberdef.name: TTL_import

briefdescription.para: Import the external tensor to the internal tensor returning when complete.

detaileddescription.para:
internal_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the internal tensor.
external_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the const external tensor.
event
A TTL_event type to allow detection of import completion.
Complete description of what not how here.

briefdescription.para: Import the external tensor to the internal tensor returning when complete.

detaileddescription.para:
internal_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the internal tensor.
external_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the external tensor.
Complete description of what not how here.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_sub_tensor< TENSORTYPE > &internal_sub_tensor, const TTL_tensor< TENSORTYPE > const_external_tensor, TTL_event *event)
memberdef.name: TTL_import_sub_tensor

parameterdescription.para: A TTL_int_tensor describing the internal tensor.
A TTL_const_ext_tensor describing the external tensor.
A TTL_event type to allow detection of import completion.

simplesect.para: TTL_import for full API and parameter information

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_tensor< TENSORTYPE > &internal_tensor, const TTL_tensor< TENSORTYPE > &external_tensor, TTL_event *event)
memberdef.name: TTL_export

briefdescription.para: Export the external tensor to the internal tensor returning when complete.

detaileddescription.para:
internal_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the internal tensor.
external_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the const external tensor.
event
A TTL_event type to allow detection of import completion.
Complete description of what not how here.

briefdescription.para: Export the external tensor to the internal tensor returning when complete.

detaileddescription.para:
internal_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the internal tensor.
external_tensor
A TTL_int_tensor describing the const external tensor.
Complete description of what not how here.
Sets the first num bytes of the block of memory pointed by ptr to the specified value (interpreted as an unsigned char).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the block of memory to fill.
Value to be set. The value is passed as an int, but the function fills the block of memory using the unsigned char conversion of this value.
Number of bytes to be set to the value.

simplesect.para: ptr is to the output is returned.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *const dst, const size_t x_offset, const size_t y_offset, size_t num_bytes_per_element, size_t num_elements_per_line, size_t dst_total_line_length, size_t num_lines, size_t total_lines, size_t num_planes)
memberdef.name: TTL_clear_void_space

briefdescription.para: Clear any unpopulated space in the target area.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_sub_tensor< INT_TENSORTYPE > internal_sub_tensor, const TTL_tensor< EXT_TENSORTYPE > const_external_tensor, INT_TENSORTYPE **const dst_address, EXT_TENSORTYPE **const src_address)
memberdef.name: TTL_import_pre_fill
